name: shadcn
tagline: CLI-driven rulebook and workflow for adding, updating, styling, and composing shadcn/ui components, presets, and chat UI in a project.
verdict: Extensive, concrete ruleset with idempotency checks (checks installed components before adding) and explicit user-confirmation gates before destructive --overwrite. Gaps: no negative-trigger scope statement, unpinned CLI invocations throughout, thin failure-path guidance for external CLI calls, no version signal.

highlights.summary: CLI invoked unpinned as `npx shadcn@latest` / `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest` throughout; well-known tool but no version pin.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere in description or body.
Many external CLI steps (info, docs, add, apply) have no stated fallback if the command errors or a registry is unreachable.
